transition.intent: Reopen the public Terraform template for an explicit provider-aware TFLint baseline after the recovered public-safe CI validation contract remains green. The next phase must keep provider-aware lint optional and separate from required backend-disabled validation.
transition.decision_rule: Route a phase-transition after the recovered validation contract test and Terraform formatting checks pass without provider downloads.

phase_model.purpose: Add and verify public-safe Terraform validation for pull requests.
exit_criteria: Terraform state and plans are untracked

phase_model.purpose: Document and validate reusable module input, output, and example contracts.
exit_criteria: module contract covers inputs, outputs, and examples

phase_model.purpose: Add an optional public-safe TFLint, Checkov, or equivalent IaC policy scan gate.
blocked_work: mandatory tools that break minimal local validation
exit_criteria: optional IaC scan gate is documented

phase_model.purpose: Maintain the public Terraform template after readiness gates are complete.
blocked_work: new infrastructure scope without an explicit phase

phase_model.purpose: Add an optional public-safe TFLint provider-aware lint lane without making public CI depend on extra scanners, provider credentials, or backend state.
blocked_work: mandatory scanner installation in public CI
exit_criteria: minimal backend-disabled validation still passes without TFLint
validation contract tests cover opt-in behavior

required_gates.description: The repository validation script must pass.
The optional IaC policy scan lane must be documented and must not be mandatory for minimal public validation.
